# Go Out On A LIM

> Premium travel advisory and concierge services by Andrew Lim

## About

Go Out On A LIM is a premium travel advisory service founded by Andrew Lim, a seasoned traveler who has visited 130 countries and flown over 2.8 million miles. The service offers thoughtful, experience-based travel planning — not algorithm-driven recommendations.

## Services

- **Bespoke Itinerary Design**: Custom trip planning tailored to individual preferences
- **Flight & Routing Strategy**: Expert advice on routes, airlines, and booking strategies
- **Hotel & Accommodation Curation**: Hand-picked recommendations based on extensive personal experience
- **Dining & Experience Guidance**: Insider knowledge on restaurants and local experiences
- **Points & Miles Consultation**: Strategic advice on loyalty programs and award travel

## Target Audience

- Travelers who value quality over quantity
- Those seeking premium and business class travel experiences
- Food-focused travelers looking for authentic culinary experiences
- Busy professionals who want expert-curated itineraries

## Contact

Website: https://www.gooutonalim.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/go.out.on.a.lim
YouTube: https://youtube.com/channel/UCURKuPfOZgqTE90Jw8mBQ7Q
Email: gooutonalimnow@gmail.com

## Content

The website features travel essays and perspectives on destinations including:
- United Island Hopper flight experience (Honolulu to Guam)
- St. Barts weekend travel guide
- Chiang Mai Khao Soi culinary guide
